description: Large letter from [...] b. Mevorakh addressed to Nahray b. Nissim (called 'Nahray ha-Rav ha-Muvhaq'). The sender's name is faded. The letter opens with large section of Hebrew blessings accompanied by biblical verses. The body of the letter is in Judaeo-Arabic but is mostly torn away. Mentions people such as "Rosh he-Qehilot" and "Rabbi Natan." (Information in part from FGP.) AA/ASE. Needs further examination for content.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
